items.name: Mixed Pakoda
items.description: Deep fried snack made with gram flour, salt, light spices and a main ingredient like onion, cabbage, carrot.

items.name: Chatpate
items.description: Puffed rice, onion, Nepalese spices, mixed with lime.

items.name: Badam Sadheko
items.description: Roasted peanuts mixed with Nepalese spices.

items.name: Bhatmas Sadeko
items.description: Fried soybean mixed with Nepalese spices.

items.name: Chicken Chilli
items.description: Popular Indo-Chinese dish of chicken, mainly boneless.

items.name: Chilli Fry
items.description: Chilli cheese fries, the perfect starter for a vegetarian.

items.name: Alu Chat
items.description: Street food prepared by frying potatoes and adding spices and chutney.

items.name: Aalu Sadeko
items.description: Spicy potato salad, blended and mixed with various Nepalese herbs and spices - boiled potato, onion, green chillies and seasoning.

items.name: Pani Puri
items.description: Round hollow puri filled with flavored water, tamarind chutney, chilli, chaat masala, potato, onion or chickpeas.

items.name: Aalu Chop
items.description: Deep fried snack made from potato, mixed with Nepalese herbs and gram flour.

items.name: Puri Tarkari
items.description: Choice of Chicken or Goat curry with Puri.

items.name: Veg Puri Tarkari
items.description: 4 Pcs of puri with white soyabean usually Matar (Chole).

items.name: Chowmein
items.description: Nepalese style noodles mixed with seasonal vegetables.

items.name: Fried Rice
items.description: Special Basmati rice fried with seasonal vegetables and Nepa Special Spices.
